name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-82
title: validate-all.py invocation uses default 'features/' root that may resolve relative to caller's CWD
description: scripts/validate-all.py line 43: 'root = root_arg or os.environ.get("FEATURES_ROOT", ".claude/features")'. The default is a RELATIVE path. When the script is invoked from a directory other than the repo root, the relative path resolves to a non-existent directory and the script prints 'vacuous pass' (line 73). The current code reports OK with exit 0 even though zero features were checked due to a CWD mismatch. Resolve the default relative to repo_root (via git rev-parse like other scripts) rather than cwd, so behavior is invariant under invocation location.

history.note: wave-4 cleanup; fixed in e10610a (impl) and 91f2c68 (tests)
